goal: 30 apples sharing one material must end up with 30 distinct material instances — one per apple, rebound. Semantic 'apple' class preserved.
thoughts: Natural follow-on to P-07 (material-param DR advisory). P-07 establishes the WHY of per-instance, P-12 tests executing the instancing. Snapshot check samples relationships on a few apples to confirm distinct bindings.
code:
find_prims_by_name(name_pattern='apple_*')
run_usd_script(code='for i in range(30): copy mat → /World/Looks/apple_mat_{i}, rebind /World/Apples/apple_{i}')
list_relationships(prim_path='/World/Apples/apple_0')
# Correct reply: '30 per-apple material instances created + rebound. Heads-up: 30 mats × N orchards = real VRAM.'
failure_modes: Losing the semantic 'apple' label on some apples during rebind.
qa_status: dialogue_canonical; structurally complete; not exercised in QA; classified 2026-05-15
